recipe.title: Super Green Pasta
steps: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook pasta until al dente. Reserve 1 cup pasta water, then drain.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and shallot. Cook 2–3 minutes until fragrant.
Add zucchini and cook 4–5 minutes until softened.
Add spinach and cook until wilted.
Transfer vegetable mixture to a blender. Add basil, cream, Parmesan, salt, and ½–1 cup pasta water. Blend until smooth.
Toss sauce with pasta. Add lemon zest and extra Parmesan before serving.
